prompt:
A sturdy aluminum camera tripod standing on a smooth workshop floor, legs extended to a mid height, with a three-way pan head on top and a quick-release plate visible. The tripod has clean locking levers and rubber feet, with a compact folded carry handle or strap nearby to suggest portability and general-purpose use for photography.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic metal textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no on-image text. Keep the tripod centered against a simple background so it reads instantly as an inventory icon.
